'''Lambert Belmas''' (born 11 August 1997) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]] and [[French national rugby league team|France]] at international level.

He previously played for the [[Catalans Dragons]] and [[FC Lézignan XIII]]. Belmas has spent time on loan at [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]].

==Background==
Belmas was born in [[Carcassonne]], [[France]].

==Career==
In 2017 he made his [[Super League]] début for [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] against the [[Huddersfield Giants]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/catalans-ease-past-huddersfield-back-back-wins/ Catalans ease past Huddersfield for back-to-back wins]</ref>

On 20 Jul 2021 it was confirmed that Lambert had left Catalans after the expiration of his contract<ref>{{cite web|website=League Writes|date=20 Jul 2021|accessdate=21 Jul 2021|title=Belmas leaves Catalans|url=https://leaguewrites.com/2021/07/20/belmas-leaves-catalans/}}</ref>

In July 2021 Lezignan announced that they had signed Bélmas.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://treizemondial.fr/lezignan-signe-lambert-belmas/|title=Lezignan sign Lambert Bélmas|website=www.treizemondial.fr}}</ref>

Belmas signed for Toulouse ahead of the 2022 [[Super League]] season, but snapped his achilles heel two days later. Toulouse committed to honouring his contract and helping his recovery from what could be a career ending injury.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://treizemondial.fr/la-tuile-pour-lambert-belmas/|title=Serious injury for Lambert Belmas|website=www.treizemondial.fr}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/houles-looks-for-one-more-squad-member/|title=Houles looking for one more player|website=www.totalrl.com}}</ref> In June 2022 it was announced that Belmas had signed a two-year deal with Toulouse.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.to13.com/a-la-une/breaking-le-to-signe-lambert-belmas/|title=TO sign Lambert Belmas|website=www.to13.com|date=1 June 2022|language=French}}</ref>
On 15 October 2023, Belmas played in Toulouse Olympique's upset loss in the [[Million Pound Game]] against the [[London Broncos]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/67105947|title=Championship Grand Final: Toulouse 14-18 London Broncos - Capital club back in Super League|website=www.bbc.co.uk}}</ref>

==International career==
He was selected in the France 9s squad for the [[2019 Rugby League World Cup 9s]].<ref>{{cite web|date=2 October 2019|title=La liste des joueurs pour la Coupe du Monde dévoilée!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/la-liste-des-joueurs-pour-la-coupe-du-monde-devoilee/|publisher=FFRXIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|date=10 October 2019|title=XIII de France: Romain Puso remplace Lilian Albert, forfait!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/xiii-de-france-romain-puso-remplace-lilian-albert-forfait/|publisher=FFR XIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}</ref>
